rules: Specialists write only to role-scoped work directories and handoffs.
Only the coordinator writes canonical Phase 1-6 outputs.
Sort merged evidence by app_id, phase, and evidence id.
Reject duplicate evidence ids when payloads differ.
Preserve both observations and create a conflict record when conclusions disagree.
Do not publish a phase while required handoffs are failed, missing, or invalid.
Do not link app graph nodes to global nodes until the evidence and shared-node identity are accepted.
Do not render derived artifacts before independent QA passes.
Merge leaf-module handoffs in processing-order.json order before parent or cross-module synthesis.
Incremental refresh may supersede prior evidence but must not delete the prior immutable record.
path_policy: All writes must resolve inside the current run directory.
